release.name: Dia Supported, Bookmarks on New Tab, Auto PiP
release.body:
Tags: Release

从 0.9.3 版本开始，更新后会显示 [更新日志](https://lumno.kubai.design/release/) 

**⚠️注意：由于快捷键机制做了调整，旧版插件的快捷键可能失效，烦请访问 `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` 重新设置下。如有不便，敬请谅解！**

## Features
- 新标签页支持添加收藏夹。感谢 **ChisakaKanako/jiahao_jayden**
- 支持自动画中画功能。当从播放着视频的网页切走时，会自动触发视频画中画，保证播放不断流
- 适配网页深色模式 favicon

## Bug Fixes
- 支持了 [**Dia 浏览器**](https://www.diabrowser.com/) ，需要在 `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` 中将 In Dia 改为 In Global
- 修复了部分情况下会请求 `访问本地网络上其他设备` 权限的问题  [CLOSED: #1 Issue Local network permissions
](https://github.com/kubai087/lumno-extension/issues/1)
- 优化了输入框的交互，提升稳定性。感谢 **r/Adventurous_Act_9255**
- 修复了部分 i18n 问题
- 修复了已打开标签页无法切换的问题。感谢 **r/ok_taro_5892**

---
From version 0.9.3 onward, updates will show the [changelog](https://lumno.kubai.design/release/).

⚠️ Important Update: We've made some changes to how shortcuts work, which might have reset your current settings. Kindly head over to `chrome://extensions/shortcuts` to set them up again. Thanks for your understanding!

## Features
- New Tab now supports adding bookmarks. Thanks to **ChisakaKanako/jiahao_jayden**.
- Added Auto Picture-in-Picture. When you switch away from a page playing video, PiP is triggered automatically so playback continues uninterrupted.
- Added favicon adaptation for websites in dark mode.

## Bug Fixes
- Added support for [Dia Browser](https://www.diabrowser.com/). You’ll need to change the shortcut scope from "In Dia" to "Global" at `chrome://extensions/shortcuts`
- Fixed an issue where `access devices on local networks` permission could be requested in some cases. [CLOSED: #1 Issue Local network permissions](https://github.com/kubai087/lumno-extension/issues/1)
- Improved command bar interactions for better stability. Thanks to **r/Adventurous_Act_9255**.
- Fixed several i18n issues.
- Fixed an issue where already-open tabs could not be switched to. Thanks to **r/ok_taro_5892**.
